title: UTC+13

infobox.value: is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +13:00. Because it does not contain any land in the [Northern Hemisphere](/wiki/Northern_Hemisphere "Northern Hemisphere"), this time zone is exclusive to the [Southern Hemisphere](/wiki/Southern_Hemisphere "Southern Hemisphere").
* ["No DST Start in Fiji in 2021"](https://www.timeanddate.com/news/time/fiji-no-dst-2021.html). timeanddate. Retrieved 1 January 2024.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [UTC+13](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13&redirect=no "UTC+13"))

Identifier for a time offset from UTC of +13

**UTC+13:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +13:00. Because it does not contain any land in the [Northern Hemisphere](/wiki/Northern_Hemisphere "Northern Hemisphere"), this time zone is exclusive to the [Southern Hemisphere](/wiki/Southern_Hemisphere "Southern Hemisphere").

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/94/Timezones2011_UTC%2B13.png/330px-Timezones2011_UTC%2B13.png)](/wiki/File:Timezones2011_UTC%2B13.png)

UTC+13:00: blue (December), orange (June), yellow (year-round), light blue (sea areas)

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

*Principal cities: [Apia](/wiki/Apia "Apia"), [Atafu](/wiki/Atafu "Atafu"), [Nukuʻalofa](/wiki/Nuku%CA%BBalofa "Nukuʻalofa")*

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Oceania")]

#### Micronesia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Micronesia")]

* [Kiribati](/wiki/Kiribati "Kiribati")
  + [Phoenix Islands](/wiki/Phoenix_Islands "Phoenix Islands")

#### Polynesia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Polynesia")]

* New Zealand
  + [Tokelau](/wiki/Tokelau "Tokelau") – [Time in Tokelau](/wiki/Time_in_Tokelau "Time in Tokelau")[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)
* [Samoa](/wiki/Samoa "Samoa") – [Time in Samoa](/wiki/Time_in_Samoa "Time in Samoa")[[2]](#cite_note-:1-2)[[3]](#cite_note-:2-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* [Tonga](/wiki/Tonga "Tonga") – [Time in Tonga](/wiki/Time_in_Tonga "Time in Tonga")

## As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)")]

*Principal cities: [Auckland](/wiki/Auckland "Auckland"), [Christchurch](/wiki/Christchurch "Christchurch"), [Wellington](/wiki/Wellington "Wellington")*

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Oceania")]

#### Australasia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Australasia")]

* [New Zealand](/wiki/New_Zealand "New Zealand") (except [Chatham Islands](/wiki/Chatham_Islands "Chatham Islands")) – [New Zealand Daylight Time](/wiki/Time_in_New_Zealand "Time in New Zealand")

### Antarctica

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Antarctica")]

* Some research bases in [Antarctica](/wiki/Antarctica "Antarctica"), in particular the [South Pole](/wiki/South_Pole "South Pole") and the [McMurdo Station](/wiki/McMurdo_Station "McMurdo Station"). At [New Year](/wiki/New_Year "New Year"), these places are the first in the world to see the [Sun](/wiki/Sun "Sun"), which is then [visible at midnight](/wiki/Midnight_sun "Midnight sun").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: History")]

[Kiribati](/wiki/Kiribati "Kiribati") introduced a change for its eastern half on 31 December 1994, from time zones [UTC−11:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9211:00 "UTC−11:00") and [UTC−10:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9210:00 "UTC−10:00") to UTC+13:00 and [UTC+14:00](/wiki/UTC%2B14:00 "UTC+14:00"), to avoid having the country divided by the [International Date Line](/wiki/International_Date_Line "International Date Line").

Tonga has been on UTC+13:00 for many years. [Daylight saving time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time "Daylight saving time") was used in the southern summer seasons from October 1999 to January 2002, and from November 2016 to January 2017.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

UTC+13:00 was used until 2009 as a daylight time (summer in Northern Hemisphere) in the easternmost parts of [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") (Chukotka and Kamchatka) that used [Kamchatka Time](/wiki/Kamchatka_Time "Kamchatka Time").

At the end of 29 December 2011 (UTC−10:00), Samoa advanced its standard time from UTC−11:00 to UTC+13:00 (and its daylight saving time from UTC−10:00 to UTC+14:00), essentially moving the international date line to the other side of the country, skipping 30 December 2011.[[2]](#cite_note-:1-2)[[3]](#cite_note-:2-3) Following Samoa's decision, Tokelau also simultaneously advanced its standard time (used without daylight saving time), from UTC−11:00 to UTC+13:00.[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)[[3]](#cite_note-:2-3)

[Fiji](/wiki/Fiji "Fiji"), where normal time is UTC+12:00, decides year by year whether it will observe DST, and if so for which dates, which are usually a short period between November or December and January. No DST has been observed since 2020–2021.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B13:00&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: See also")]

* [Time in Fiji](/wiki/Time_in_Fiji "Time in Fiji")
* [Time in New Zealand](/wiki/Time_in_New_Zealand "Time in New Zealand")
* [Time in Russia](/wiki/Time_in_Russia "Time in Russia")
* [Time in Samoa](/wiki/Time_in_Samoa "Time in Samoa")
* [UTC−11:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9211:00 "UTC−11:00"), which is exactly one day behind UTC+13:00.
* [UTC−12:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9212:00 "UTC−12:00"), the last time zone to start a new day
